name: Gwen

movements.notes: touch and go at floor only; no dumping; same load across all sets; rest as needed

description: A touch-and-go clean and jerk load test across three descending sets (15-12-9), using the same self-selected weight for every rep — scored by load rather than time, rewarding barbell efficiency under fatigue.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
